name: Steve Chabot
subject: Blog Update 7.18.18
body:
Trump and Putin in Helsinki No Images? [Click here](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-jjzlrg-kujkulhluu-f/) [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjzlrg-kujkulhluu-r/) [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjzlrg-kujkulhluu-y/)
### [Trump and Putin in Helsinki](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjzlrg-kujkulhluu-j/)
This week on the blog I'm discussing President Trump's meeting in Helsinki with Russian President Vladimir Putin as well as breaking down President Trump's comments following. Click below to read more.
[Read this entry >>](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjzlrg-kujkulhluu-t/) _Previous Weekly Posts_ [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjzlrg-kujkulhluu-i/)
### [Is Roe Finally Gonna Go?](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjzlrg-kujkulhluu-d/)
Monday night President Trump selected Judge Brett Kavanaugh to replace Anthony Kennedy on the U.S. Supreme Court. I think this was an excellent pick. And it brings up the discussion, is there a potential for Roe to be overturned? I'm talking about it in this week's blog. Click below to read more.
[Read this entry >>](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjzlrg-kujkulhluu-h/) [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjzlrg-kujkulhluu-k/)
### [A Socialist Gets Elected, and A Vacancy on The Supreme Court](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjzlrg-kujkulhluu-u/)
There were two things which happened last week - one of them was a pretty big deal, and the other was a really big deal. Click below to read more.

On a separate note, I hope you and your family have a wonderful Independence Day. God Bless America! [Read this entry >>](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjzlrg-kujkulhluu-o/) [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjzlrg-kujkulhluu-b/)
### [Unhinged](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjzlrg-kujkulhluu-n/)
The Left seems to be coming unhinged. So many have apparently been afflicted with Trump derangement syndrome, that a lot of them will say just about anything. This has been going on since President Trump was elected, but it seems to be getting worse. This week I'm looking at just the latest examples in my blog. Click below to read more. [Read this entry >>](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjzlrg-kujkulhluu-p/) [Contribute](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjzlrg-kujkulhluu-x/) [Get a Yard Sign](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjzlrg-kujkulhluu-m/) | [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjzlrg-kujkulhluu-c/)| [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjzlrg-kujkulhluu-q/)| [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjzlrg-kujkulhluu-a/)

name: The White House
subject: Our pledge to America’s workers
body:
Your 1600 Daily:
| | [](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=e8e94030de9c677f3a898157099162ef01065e9425aee26e4bf79ff867c370701eb634745f91099e1ae4d1cf389453ccd9bf2c351a9cc024) The White House • July 19, 2018
## The Day Ahead
President Donald J. Trump will sign an Executive Order that sets the stage for developing a National strategy for workforce development. [Watch live at 3 p.m. ET. ](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=e8e94030de9c677f65626b029a7bc7afe2770af4b184d860df7916b90b21884262eb64cc7e1edaff84ef963f25c8845302085bc31f43e0a6) |
---
|

## Our pledge to America’s workers
**The over 3.2 million jobs** created on President Trump’s watch have benefited a diverse span of Americans: women, manufacturers, Hispanic Americans, African Americans, young people, people with disabilities, and more. Many groups that have struggled historically are seeing their unemployment levels now hit record lows.
**Many of these jobs require new skills**. “We want to make sure that we have the workforce development programs we need to ensure these jobs are being filled by American workers,” President Trump says.
**Today, President Trump will be joined** by Ivanka Trump and more than 20 companies and organizations in pledging their unwavering commitment to America’s workforce. The President will sign an Executive Order that establishes the National Council for the American Worker, charged with developing a real National strategy to address workforce development. Among other tasks, the Council will help expand the number of apprenticeships available to Americans today.
[Watch the President’s announcement live at 3 p.m. ET.](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=e8e94030de9c677f65626b029a7bc7afe2770af4b184d860df7916b90b21884262eb64cc7e1edaff84ef963f25c8845302085bc31f43e0a6)
**More** : [The White House’s new push to help ‘forgotten men and women’ ](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=e8e94030de9c677f2ebaafb40fe5c265dc3ee5eb9d0c20e899c102a5d24b094dff0ba864df3658b61b614d3a71208b12a2fe8813c6d881a3)

---
|

## A fix for our deteriorating National Park System
**“America’s National Park System** is the envy of the world,” Secretary of the Interior Ryan Zinke writes this week. “Our parks tell the story of our nation, ranging from the origins of the American conservation ethic, to our sacred battlefields, to the Civil Rights Movement. Quite frankly, our American park system represents our American values.”
**Our parks drew 330 million visitors** last year, and we now risk loving them to death, Secretary Zinke explains. “The backlog of critical maintenance and repairs in the National Park Service stands at $11.6 billion.” Until recently, addressing that backlog seemed out of reach.
**President Trump supports a bipartisan bill** , now before the Senate, that would preserve the splendor and beauty of our National Parks. The President’s 2019 budget request to Congress proposed the largest investment in public lands infrastructure in American history. In that spirit, President Trump’s leadership is bringing both parties together to protect our National heritage.
[Preserving our parks is not a Republican or Democrat issue--it’s an American issue.](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=e8e94030de9c677fe3193f6afe6e9b8ef404ec308027232e042cec4434199e324f4f0844f6464b75f1506923dda4536fe4e14ae4761e83c5)

---
|

## Photo of the Day
Official White House Photo by D. Myles Cullen
**President Donald J. Trump holds a Cabinet meeting** | July 18, 2018

[Privacy Policy](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=e8e94030de9c677fc832ecd24b3eba8913f19009dcf92a22bc74f45dbdf71b16777149098e6c9bc2df5d96a85c10b5f270232ccdab7e2816) | [Contact the White House](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=e8e94030de9c677f52a3c024e4910c084e7e2ddc1e853d90246c58d907b9fac0483f5505753bc7f21064ef4c427cddd8cbfb0352314a4ee9) | [Unsubscribe](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/unsub_center.aspx?qs=d453c42a6560d1d41c279fec4e0ef7d5b53f9da36bda1967dca0d5add540d7f306c1e977d047e573e8f09c42dc839928272f0dca6a65b094340d07d97022c36b)
---

name: Martha Roby for Congress
subject: Thank you!
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Martha Roby for Congress
body:
| | | | [View in browser](http://teamroby.mailmaverick.com/lt.php?s=28c51fb5ce169770ebe8202fcd9bdf95&i=124A144A9A3839)

---
| | [](http://teamroby.mailmaverick.com/lt.php?s=28c51fb5ce169770ebe8202fcd9bdf95&i=124A144A9A3840)
---
| | Friends,
Wow - what an exciting night we had on Tuesday! It is hard to put into words how much your support means to me and to all of Team Roby.
I’m truly honored and humbled that the people of Alabama’s Second District have again placed their trust and confidence in me, and that I will have the opportunity to continue to do this job on their behalf. I count it a tremendous responsibility, but also a tremendous blessing, to serve you. I want each person I represent to know, from the bottom of my heart, that I wake up every day and strive to be the absolute best representative of our values. This seat belongs to **_you_** \-- and I will never forget that as long as I have the privilege of being your Member of Congress.
Over the last year and a half, it’s been a great privilege to be a part of the conservative momentum and to work alongside my colleagues in Congress and the Trump Administration to push some very important priorities over the finish line. We are in a unique position to accomplish even more, and I’m eager to continue the fight.
Thank you, again, for your support! I am forever grateful for each and every person who showed up to the polls to give me this extraordinary opportunity.
\- Martha

name: Mel Hall
subject: [SHARE] Urge my opponent to accept offer to debate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mel Hall for Congress
body:
Friends,

Yesterday, I sent Rep. Jackie Walorski a letter calling on her to accept the offer to three televised debates.

Accountable leadership is central to effective representation in Washington. That's why I am firmly committed to providing the voters in the 2nd District with the chance to hear directly from us.

**Please help me ensure that Hoosiers have the opportunity to watch their 2nd District congressional candidates debate. Share my letter to Rep. Jackie Walorski now to spread the word.**

****[SHARE ON FACEBOOK](https://act.myngp.com/el/96RmZHZ6bePujainOaPRbLyVAGOVZIgF4isaMAW193U=/bKm-wa2yhFCzs-zt7ZLQpjIg1ozOO7-M-xQPQwj5N7M=)****
****[SHARE ON TWITTER](https://act.myngp.com/el/96RmZHZ6bePujainOaPRbLyVAGOVZIgF4isaMAW193U=/AGBxJXzgsZtjs26IR5HE_F8uqESn1ObRwPvbhILD8Ng=)****

As I travel across the ten counties of the 2nd District, I talk every day with Hoosiers who want to hear our views on the challenges facing northern Indiana and our nation. These Hoosiers want to participate in our democracy, and we must provide them with the opportunity to do so.

Thank you for helping to spread the word and show Rep. Walorski that 2nd District voters are eager for three debates.

Mel Hall

Paid for by Mel Hall for Congress
---
Mel Hall for Congress
P.O. Box 862
South Bend, IN 46624 United States

name: Grace H. [field organizer]
subject: Fwd: Will you be part of Amy's team?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Klobuchar for Minnesota
body:
Hi,

Wow. The response to our email on Saturday was incredible. The phones are still ringing here with people calling to help out.

Minnesotans from Roseau to Rochester are signing up and pledging to volunteer. **[Will you join them today?](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=05Ycvl8VPetUcnon4TcTyWUEgLslb9gK)**

Every day I'm talking with people who are getting involved for the first time, and that wouldn't be happening without supporters like you doing their part to keep this grassroots team strong.

So whether it's knocking on doors, staffing a table at a community event, or dropping off lawn signs, **[will you join the team and pledge to volunteer today?](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=gIlzRFvOaulYVPRqWjDjRWUEgLslb9gK)**

Thanks,

Grace

\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Laney A. [digital director]
Subject: Will you be part of Amy's team?

Hi,

I don't have to tell you how hard Senator Klobuchar works to make a difference for Minnesota, [**but did you know how many supporters like you are signing up to volunteer in this critical election year?**](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=y8re37EDeZXYXGvX2%2FUdTmUEgLslb9gK)

It's a lot -- and with the chaos in Washington it's never been more important for our grassroots team here in Minnesota to be as strong as possible.

**Will you join the team and pledge to volunteer?**

**[You can march in a parade, write a letter to the editor, share Amy's news online, or even take a lawn sign for your yard. Just click here to sign up!](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=iKWryOM%2BUdR0TbG5GzjYI2UEgLslb9gK)**

By signing up you'll be part of a team with members in all 87 Minnesota counties. You'll be part of a team that's made over 40,000 grassroots contributions, marched in parades in every part of our state, and stood up to the special interests by demanding we tackle climate change, save net neutrality, and protect people with preexisting conditions from being denied health care.

The special interests know that Team Klobuchar is tough -- but now it's time to show them just how strong -- and how big -- we really are.

As the summer heats up, can we count on you to [**join thousands of other volunteers across Minnesota and help Amy at this critical time?**](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=N8ESy4kFtDF0i7G2SAxLTWUEgLslb9gK)

Thanks,

Laney A.
Digital Director

**[Contribute](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=HY1Nhr8JPvsrV1QUpeSyzmUEgLslb9gK)**

[](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=RjkyqQYU6%2FfXod7crhYfUmUEgLslb9gK)
---
[](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=%2FJFIzgU%2FSFvk2%2B8T1u0JgWUEgLslb9gK)
[](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=%2Fd4XliyOOg7hcVIeku5YKWUEgLslb9gK)
****
****
****
****
****
**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from the email list, please click here.](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=%2BTey4uAIjrYGccafHiI1nWUEgLslb9gK)
P.O. Box 4146, Saint Paul, MN 55104
Paid for by Klobuchar for Minnesota
**

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: The Mainstream Media wants our agenda to fail
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
Can I get your thoughts on this, Friend? |
---
| | | | | | | | [](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=06d3156b202b58ffb475a687bbdd7e5a8b1ac1c0225b6b654059fa72ee191ee3f17e33abc4d26ab478d52595e10fb1155ba91343891c61f2)
---

Friend,

Why is the mainstream media's opinion any more important than yours?

You have just as much of a right to your beliefs about America. And it's time for these coastal elitists to accept that.

I'm once again releasing our Mainstream Media Accountability Survey to show the media that the American people are fed up with the Fake News Machine.

**[I need you to take the MEDIA ACCOUNTABILITY SURVEY to do your part to fight back against the fake news attacks and deceptions.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=06d3156b202b58fff06bff797e6a4c3b5788184ab9b93fb988b0954ca65a1b32a76ea64ea742832b086823ab1d29bd2c792a8355f08533e7)**
**[MEDIA ACCOUNTABILITY SURVEY](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=06d3156b202b58ff768832f47014691a890873e45c7233b1353e2eec216bc7d9de4d6f359715c438dfdf74503213a1c2fd93984ba1a367ec)** **SUPPORTER:[dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=06d3156b202b58ff90ebef90d5db94f274ea6294d941898cc905d90bf3537fe25510fd820dc431b3a49e7f65ccef516ef98c0fe9f9f43b88)
SURVEY ID: 6124335 - 2018
SURVEY RESPONSE: ****PENDING**
**DEADLINE: 11:59 PM TONIGHT** ********[ **1) Do you trust the mainstream media to put the interests of Americans first?

⚪ Yes

⚪ No

⚪ No Opinion

⚪ Other**](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=06d3156b202b58ffe402b8df37d6ea7c469331f029fa5df606000d60c9dfdd5951c23c047eaf87b3bcbc9eb7eed9f8818ea8ddd0bd53db58)********
********[ TAKE THE SURVEY NOW](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=06d3156b202b58ffb376440cc9196ece15aef2b1dab72fcb918c08e33970aca1aa7dad7cee9b5e7ca339acd08add923bd46fbab71dfe410e)**** ****_Attention: Please share your thoughts before 11:59 PM to be sure your answers are submitted on time:**[https://action.donaldjtrump.com/msm-media-accountability-survey-july-2018](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=06d3156b202b58ff6663a6d7a54bdf016efc47e6c030b998350d546e77828c8924c3228200811f412b69c7d7e0b5e54bf7818633dd393411)**_

I've said it before and I will say it again: _**the Mainstream Media wants our agenda to fail.**_

It's a 24/7 barrage of fake stories, and absolute revulsion for everything we stand for as a movement.

Liberal propaganda machines have used every possible tactic to slander, undermine, and insult our movement as we fight to put AMERICA FIRST.

But you are the reason they keep failing.

You have the courage to hold them accountable. And it's time for you to do it again.

**[Please take the Mainstream Media Accountability Survey to do your part to fight back against the media's attacks and deceptions.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=06d3156b202b58ff062955631a02d53002c1494e102f6bbda7f8b90871f369b741bc293431d2fad05147a49ed3e2f5c799af9ccb178ff78e)**

Thank you,

Donald J. Trump
President of the United States

clean_body: Can I get your thoughts on this, Friend? | | | | | | | | | Friend, Why is the mainstream media's opinion any more important than yours? You have just as much of a right to your beliefs about America. And it's time for these coastal elitists to accept that. I'm once again releasing our Mainstream Media Accountability Survey to show the media that the American people are fed up with the Fake News Machine. SUPPORTER: SURVEY ID: 6124335 - 2018 SURVEY RESPONSE: PENDING DEADLINE: 11:59 PM TONIGHT ********** **** Attention: Please share your thoughts before 11:59 PM to be sure your answers are submitted on time: I've said it before and I will say it again: the Mainstream Media wants our agenda to fail. It's a 24/7 barrage of fake stories, and absolute revulsion for everything we stand for as a movement. Liberal propaganda machines have used every possible tactic to slander, undermine, and insult our movement as we fight to put AMERICA FIRST. But you are the reason they keep failing. You have the courage to hold them accountable. And it's time for you to do it again. ** Thank you, Donald J. Trump President of the United States Contributions to the Trump Make America Great Again Committee are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J. Trump for President, Inc. and the Republican National Committee. You are receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com Trump Make America Great Again Committee, 138 Conant Street, 2nd Floor, Beverly, MA 01915 We believe this is an important way to reach our grassroots supporters with the most up-to-date information regarding the efforts of the Trump Make America Great Again Committee and President Trump, and we're glad you're on our team. It's because of grassroots supporters like you that we will Make America Great Again, and we appreciate your support. Thank you for all that you do! | |

Friends,

Andrew Gillum has led on the big issues since day one of this race, and last night's debate in Fort Myers was no different.

From supporting Medicare-for-All, giving teachers and support staff a raise, to protecting women's health and people with pre-existing conditions, and taking on the NRA and demanding common sense gun reform, Andrew's proven time and time again that he's the leader we need to rebuild Florida.

**[But Andrew needs your help to take back the Governor's mansion this November -- and it starts with winning the primary on August 28. name: Team Menendez
subject: You don't need to get out of your chair or put down your smartphone...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Menendez for Senate
body:
This race has always been about you and supporters just like you, friend.

While Bob Hugin continues to spend millions of dollars on negative TV ads trying to tear down Bob Menendez, we are building this campaign up by having conversations in coffee shops, on parade routes, and doorsteps all over New Jersey.

Here's how you can help -- and you don't even need to get out of your chair or put down your smartphone to do it. Go like and follow Bob Menendez on [**Facebook**](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/c846c94/3af3c5d/3b9c72b5/4ec38bb6/1044887528/VEsH/ "https://www.facebook.com/MenendezForNJ/") and [**Twitter.**](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/c846c94/3af3c5d/3b9c72b5/4ec38ba9/1044887528/VEsE/ "https://twitter.com/BobMenendezNJ")
[](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/c846c94/3af3c5d/3b9c72b5/4ec38bb6/1044887528/VEsF/ "https://www.facebook.com/MenendezForNJ/")
| [Like Bob on Facebook](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/c846c94/3af3c5d/3b9c72b5/4ec38bb6/1044887528/VEsC/ "https://www.facebook.com/MenendezForNJ/")
[Follow Bob on Twitter](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/c846c94/3af3c5d/3b9c72b5/4ec38ba9/1044887528/VEsD/ "https://twitter.com/BobMenendezNJ")

When you follow us on social media, you'll get all the latest campaign news, you'll learn about opportunities to volunteer and get involved near you, and you'll be able to help us fight back against Hugin's negative attacks online.

Plus you'll be a part of a great progressive community that's working to #resist Trump and make sure Democrats win in November.

[**Like Bob Menendez on Facebook**](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/c846c94/3af3c5d/3b9c72b5/4ec38bb6/1044887528/VEsA/ "https://www.facebook.com/MenendezForNJ/")

[**Follow @BobMenendezNJ on Twitter**](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/c846c94/3af3c5d/3b9c72b5/4ec38ba9/1044887528/VEsB/ "https://twitter.com/BobMenendezNJ")

Thank you,

Team Menendez

If that is not your preferred email address, you can update your information [here.](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/c846c94/3af3c5d/3b9c72b5/4ec38ba8/1044887528/VEsHBQ/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/s/update-your-contact-information?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") We believe emails are an important way to stay in contact with supporters, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/c846c94/3af3c5d/3b9c72b5/4ec38bab/1044887528/VEsHBA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/s/update-your-preferences?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). Menendez for Senate appreciates any feedback you might have. [Click here](mailto:info@menendezfornj.com?Subject=Feedback) to contact Menendez for Senate with any questions, concerns, or ideas. Want to stay updated on the campaign through social media? You can like Menendez for Senate on [Facebook](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/c846c94/3af3c5d/3b9c72b5/4ec38bb6/1044887528/VEsHBw/ "https://www.facebook.com/MenendezForNJ/") or follow the campaign on [Twitter](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/c846c94/3af3c5d/3b9c72b5/4ec38ba9/1044887528/VEsHBg/ "https://twitter.com/BobMenendezNJ"). clean_body: This race has always been about you and supporters just like you, friend. While Bob Hugin continues to spend millions of dollars on negative TV ads trying to tear down Bob Menendez, we are building this campaign up by having conversations in coffee shops, on parade routes, and doorsteps all over New Jersey. Here's how you can help -- and you don't even need to get out of your chair or put down your smartphone to do it. Go like and follow Bob Menendez on "" and "" "" | "" "" When you follow us on social media, you'll get all the latest campaign news, you'll learn about opportunities to volunteer and get involved near you, and you'll be able to help us fight back against Hugin's negative attacks online. Plus you'll be a part of a great progressive community that's working to #resist Trump and make sure Democrats win in November. "" "" Thank you, Team Menendez Paid for by Menendez for Senate Contributions or gifts to Menendez for Senate are not tax deductible. "" ""

name: Austin Petersen
subject: Preparing for battle!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Austin Petersen for US Senate
body:
| Friend, This is the very last end-of-month online fundraising drive before the August primary. I can’t believe how far we’ve come. However, I still have not seen you make an online contribution to the campaign? We are only a few weeks away. I truly believe that are going to win this thing. It is a two man race. I am the candidate to defeat Josh Hawley and Claire McCaskill. But I need the last minute funds to take down Hawley in August. This is one of the last opportunities to make a contribution that will have a major impact on the outcome of the election. Friend, I am asking you to make your first online donation at this CRUCIAL moment in the campaign. name: Osmack for Missouri
subject: 29 Hours until deadline: how your donations help us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Osmack for Missouri |
body:
Friends,

With 20 days until the primary election, and such a critical House seat on the line, we really do need your help.

We can remove the Representative who isn’t accountable to the people of Missouri’s 2nd District. We can put leaders in Congress who listen and stand up for us. We can show the current Republican-controlled Congress that we won’t stand by while they consistently put profits and power over the fundamental needs of the people.

This is a grassroots campaign: we are focused on knocking on doors, calling voters, and connecting with people who want to see real change in this district. But to get everyone to polls in this crucial midterm, we need to raise the money to spread Mark’s message to as many voters as possible.

Our finance team has set a fundraising goal for the next 2 days:

Can you help us raise $5,500 in the next 48 hours?

Thank you for all your support. Let’s go win this together: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markformissouri

The Mark Osmack Team

-----------------------------------------
| Paid for by Osmack for Missouri |
-----------------------------------------

Osmack for Missouri
P.O. Box 411572
St. Louis MO 63141 United States

name: Jason Yates
subject: Guess the Democrat Senator who voted for Judge Kavanaugh
body:
Peter,
The speculation has begun; many are asking will any Senate Republicans vote against Kavanaugh’s confirmation and will any Democrats vote for him?
Fifty-one votes are needed in the Senate to confirm Brett Kavanaugh to the Supreme Court.
In 2006 the Senate voted to confirm Kavanaugh to the U.S. Court of Appeals on the D.C. Circuit.
**Do you know the only current Democrat Senator who voted to confirm Kavanaugh to his current DC position?**
**Take a guess below by clicking on what you believe to be the correct answer!**
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.myfaithvotes.org%2Fdemocrat-senator-who-voted-for-judge-kavanaugh%2F%3Fa%3D1&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180719qna01&n=1)

name: J.D. Scholten
subject: Steve King Makes Headlines… Again. Time to Say ENOUGH!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten4Iowa Campaign Committee
body:
Peter,
Steve King made national headlines yet again today. Take a look at the Huffington Post’s front page:

_When a HuffPost reporter on Capitol Hill Tuesday asked King about his retweet of a neo-Nazi, the congressman said all of his tweets are “true and objective.” On Wednesday, when the same reporter asked King if he is a white supremacist or a white nationalist, the congressman didn’t deny the allegation._
_“I don’t answer those questions,” he said. “I say to people that use those kind of allegations: Use those words a million times, because you’re reducing the value of them every time, and many of the people that use those words and make those allegations and ask those questions can’t even define the words they’re using.” _
_So we have defined the words, and all the evidence is there: King is a white supremacist._
I'm happy to answer the question: **White supremacy has no place in America.**
**_[Contribute what you can today and together we'll make sure Steve King no longer has a place in Congress!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1684191/8962870/459035665?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMTFlYmMxNy04MjhiLWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDBkM2ExMmJiYjEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cWktG6AarIybCu09LH1DYfOgoUmJ_Pxw5Qt0eMFewqg=)_**
I’ve tried to make this campaign more about the things I want to do to help the people of this district—about my vision for fixing our broken health care system, bringing a new economy to rural Iowa, and fighting for our farmers who are hurting. But it’s impossible to ignore the fact that **Steve King continues to be a complete embarrassment to the people of this district and this state.**
As a 5th-generation Iowan, I am deeply disturbed and appalled that Steve King refuses to denounce the abhorrent concepts of white supremacy and white nationalism. My Iowa values and my baseball career taught me that people of all backgrounds can achieve greater things by working together for a common cause. I was fortunate to have had teammates from six different continents and **my Catholic faith taught me we are all equally loved and valued, regardless of race. I’m not sure what bible Steve King uses. **
Northwest Iowa is tired of Steve King’s divisive politics, which is only good for embarrassing us on the national stage. A Des Moines Register poll from last fall showed I am not alone in my feelings as a Democrat trailed King by only three points. We are on the verge of a farm crisis, health care remains unaffordable for many rural folks, and more of our youngest and brightest keep leaving western Iowa. We urgently need a voice that genuinely cares more about building our district’s future than it does about tearing us apart. **It’s time to replace Steve King’s extremist political views with someone who will fight for the people of Northwest Iowa. **
I’m embarrassed to be represented in Congress by Steve King. Sixteen years is long enough and it’s time for change. [**_Say you’ll stand with me in saying, “ENOUGH” by contributing to our movement to defeat him!_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1684192/8962871/459035665?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMTFlYmMxNy04MjhiLWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDBkM2ExMmJiYjEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cWktG6AarIybCu09LH1DYfOgoUmJ_Pxw5Qt0eMFewqg=)
Let’s end this national embarrassment once and for all.
Standing Tall for All,
J.D. Scholten
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1684193/8962872/459035665?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMTFlYmMxNy04MjhiLWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDBkM2ExMmJiYjEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cWktG6AarIybCu09LH1DYfOgoUmJ_Pxw5Qt0eMFewqg=)

Paid for by Scholten4Iowa Campaign Committee
Scholten4Iowa
P.O. Box 3531
Sioux City, IA 51102
United States

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/c3fe9c08-7a8b-e811-80c2-000d3a12bbb1/111ebc17-828b-e811-80c2-000d3a12bbb1?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMTFlYmMxNy04MjhiLWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDBkM2ExMmJiYjEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cWktG6AarIybCu09LH1DYfOgoUmJ_Pxw5Qt0eMFewqg=&id=109918160&emailAddress=dpwillis67%40gmail.com).

name: Painter For Minnesota
subject: Because of You
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Painter Minnesota
body:
| [ ](http://www.painterminnesota.com/?e=876d7de1c5ec40075e79a5a0e587a9e3&utm_source=painterminnesota&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=richard_appeal_2&n=1)
---
Friend -- Thank you for your all your support to our campaign for the U.S. Senate. It’s greatly appreciated and be assured that you have made a difference. The only way to combat special interest influence is to have the support of generous individuals like you, who care deeply about restoring democracy. Your generosity has fueled my effort to end government for sale and combat the damage being inflicted on our nation by President Trump and his allies in Congress and those who refuse to confront him. Since I entered the race, I have been humbled by the outpouring of support my candidacy has received. Because of friends like you, the campaign has gained great momentum. **As I travel the state and spend time talking to voters it is clear we need more leaders who will represent the interests of EVERY Minnesotan and not the special interests of a few.** Our democracy cannot flourish as more and more people choose not to participate, feeling they have no voice. My mission is to make all Minnesotans feel that they have an equal voice and eliminate corruption eroding our system. Rest assured that I am doing everything I can to clean up politics as usual and bring needed change to our state and nation. Can you help me today, one more time, as we continue our march to Washington? **A contribution of $5, $25, $100 or whatever you're able will bring us one step closer to an August 14th victory.** [](http://www.painterminnesota.com/contribute/?e=876d7de1c5ec40075e79a5a0e587a9e3&utm_source=painterminnesota&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=richard_appeal_2&n=2 "Join the fight!") Thank you,
Richard
[http://www.painterminnesota.com/](http://www.painterminnesota.com/?e=876d7de1c5ec40075e79a5a0e587a9e3&utm_source=painterminnesota&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=richard_appeal_2&n=3)

clean_body: | Friend -- Thank you for your all your support to our campaign for the U.S. Senate. It’s greatly appreciated and be assured that you have made a difference. The only way to combat special interest influence is to have the support of generous individuals like you, who care deeply about restoring democracy. Your generosity has fueled my effort to end government for sale and combat the damage being inflicted on our nation by President Trump and his allies in Congress and those who refuse to confront him. Since I entered the race, I have been humbled by the outpouring of support my candidacy has received. Because of friends like you, the campaign has gained great momentum. As I travel the state and spend time talking to voters it is clear we need more leaders who will represent the interests of EVERY Minnesotan and not the special interests of a few. Our democracy cannot flourish as more and more people choose not to participate, feeling they have no voice. My mission is to make all Minnesotans feel that they have an equal voice and eliminate corruption eroding our system. Rest assured that I am doing everything I can to clean up politics as usual and bring needed change to our state and nation. Can you help me today, one more time, as we continue our march to Washington? A contribution of $5, $25, $100 or whatever you're able will bring us one step closer to an August 14th victory. "Join the fight!" Thank you, Richard | Prepared and Paid for by Painter Minnesota Painter Minnesota · PO Box 6780, Minneapolis, MN 55406, United States

| **Get a Free Lawn Sign!**
---
| Since he was elected, Governor Scott has made it his mission to build a more prosperous and affordable Vermont. He’s made a lot of progress, but there’s still so much work to do.

With the Republican Primary Election just a few weeks away, you can show your support by requesting a free lawn sign today!

All you need to do is [fill out this form](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=92cd689729&e=19cebfe173), and we’ll deliver it right to your home.

Also, don’t forget to vote on, or before, August 14th! You can vote now at your town clerk’s office, [request an absentee ballot in the mail](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=31c153a995&e=19cebfe173), or vote on Election Day on the 14th - polls close at 7:00 p.m.

Thank you for your continued support!

Best,

Jason

---

body:
We want to bring Missouri values into Washington, and that starts with sending Claire McCaskill home. Hello Peter,

Voters like you have asked for answers, and yet Senator McCaskill still has no explanation for her silence on Judge Kavanaugh’s Supreme Court nomination. Missourians still don’t know whether she will obstruct his nomination the way she did with Justice Gorsuch.

Missouri deserves better than this lack of transparency that is typical of D.C. insiders. We want to bring Missouri values into Washington, _**and that starts with sending Claire McCaskill home.**_

clean_body: We want to bring Missouri values into Washington, and that starts with sending Claire McCaskill home. Hello Peter, Voters like you have asked for answers, and yet Senator McCaskill still has no explanation for her silence on Judge Kavanaugh’s Supreme Court nomination. Missourians still don’t know whether she will obstruct his nomination the way she did with Justice Gorsuch. Missouri deserves better than this lack of transparency that is typical of D.C. insiders. We want to bring Missouri values into Washington, and that starts with sending Claire McCaskill home. To do that, Josh asked me if we could get 50 new recurring donors to pledge by the end of this week, so I am reaching out to strong supporters like you who want Claire McCaskill out of Washington. , you will be making a difference in this race month after month, all the way to Election Day. subject: The numbers are in and its not looking good, but there is still hope...
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY IAN TODD FOR CONGRESS
body:
The last quarter just ended and this is where we are standing....

We need your help to win in 2018.

The numbers are in from this year's 2nd quarter and it's not looking good, but there is still hope. Since this cycle started Tom Emmer has raised $1,664,958.93 and is currently sitting on $931,393.09 for the 2018 election. In contrast, we have raised $28,199.19 and closed out last quarter with $3,907.10 cash on hand.

We are being outraised 60 to 1, but there is good news. We have raised over $20,000 from people donating (https://secure.actblue.com/donate/iantodd?refcode=postq2&utm_source=Newsletter&utm_campaign=eac3d73dc2-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2018_07_17_02_53&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_28710cd7a6-eac3d73dc2-9291445) under $200, that is about 75% of our total contributions. Tom Emmer has raised $112,025 from small donors which is only 7% of his total contributions. We are a people-powered grassroots campaign and we have the numbers to show it.

The best part is, we have momentum, our support is growing every day, and more people are chipping in to help us fight for everyday Americans. We know we won't be able to out-fundraise Tom Emmer, but we know we can raise more from small-dollar donors than he can.

Donate $50 today (https://secure.actblue.com/donate/iantodd?refcode=postq2&utm_source=Newsletter&utm_campaign=eac3d73dc2-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2018_07_17_02_53&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_28710cd7a6-eac3d73dc2-9291445) so that we can reach our goal of raising more money in small-dollar donations from now until November!

name: Ben Jealous
subject: Setting the record straight
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF BEN JEALOUS, JASON SMALL, TREASURER
body:
We can't afford the status quo.

| [](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a0ac/7ab0e2c4/7ff9d9bb/349bfdad/4147081530/VEsH/ "https://act.benjealous.com/page/s/medicareforall?source=OHQ07198A") Friend, Two headlines came out in _The Baltimore Sun_ earlier this week: **Maryland analysts: Single-payer health care, proposed by Jealous, could cost state $24 billion a year** That was the first one. It's pretty misleading, but we'll get to that -- the other headline was from an editorial published shortly after. **$24 billion for single payer in Maryland sounds like a lot -- until you consider how much we spend now** Aside from the fact that these "analysts" have many caveats about the actual assumed cost of my plan, the fact of the matter is that what we spend right now in Maryland on private health insurance isn't so far off from $24 billion, and like the _Sun_ said in their editorial: "The efficiencies and bargaining power of a single-payer system might narrow -- if not eliminate or exceed -- the gap." **Larry Hogan is a governor who believes that anything new, progressive, or forward-thinking is flat-out dangerous. That's not what I believe, and I don't think that's what Maryland believes either.** [**Our families and small businesses can't afford the status quo which is why I'm fighting for better -- add your name if you're ready for Medicare-for-All.**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a0ac/7ab0e2c4/7ff9d9bb/349bfdad/4147081530/VEsE/ "https://act.benjealous.com/page/s/medicareforall?source=OHQ07198A") | [SIGN ON »](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a0ac/7ab0e2c4/7ff9d9bb/349bfdad/4147081530/VEsF/ "https://act.benjealous.com/page/s/medicareforall?source=OHQ07198A")
---
Governor Hogan would have you believe that we can't do any better than rising premiums and outrageous prescription drug costs. We all know that's not true.
While he's peddling small ideas, I'll continue to press forward with detailed plans to move us toward a stronger Maryland. That includes building upon our current all-payer system to get a much better deal for the money we already spend on healthcare.
And plenty of people agree with that -- including National Nurses United, who believe like I do that healthcare is a moral and economic imperative that we can no longer ignore. Larry Hogan and the GOP would have you believe that makes you a "communist," and anything aside from the status quo is simply "too risky."
**I know that Medicare-for-All will mean better care for less cost, and I know that scares Larry Hogan.** [**But we need to show a strong, united front if we want it -- add your name right now to say you're ready for Medicare-for-All.**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a0ac/7ab0e2c4/7ff9d9bb/349bfdad/4147081530/VEsC/ "https://act.benjealous.com/page/s/medicareforall?source=OHQ07198A")
Thank you,
Ben

[CHIP IN »](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a0ac/7ab0e2c4/7ff9d9bb/349bfdac/4147081530/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-fund-fight?source=OHQ07198Ab")
---

* * *
PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF BEN JEALOUS, JASON SMALL, TREASURER
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, [click here](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a0ac/7ab0e2c4/7ff9d9bb/349bfdaf/4147081530/VEsA/ "http://act.benjealous.com/page/s/update-your-information?source=emfooter"). Email is one of the most critical tools for our campaign, but you can let us know if you would like to [receive fewer emails](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a0ac/7ab0e2c4/7ff9d9bb/349bfdae/4147081530/VEsB/ "http://act.benjealous.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?source=emfooter") going forward. If you'd like to [unsubscribe](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a0ac/7ab0e2c4/7ff9d9bb/349bfda9/4147081530/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://act.benjealous.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"), you can do so here. [Make a contribution to Ben and Susie here](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a0ac/7ab0e2c4/7ff9d9bb/349bfda8/4147081530/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bjst_contribute?refcode=emfooter"). Contributions or gifts to Friends of Ben Jealous are not tax deductible.

name: Mara Boggs
subject: Grassroots Update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Manchin for West Virginia
body:
Dear Fellow West Virginian,

We are on the move. As West Virginians came together on the Fourth of July to honor the birth of our great nation, Joe and his team celebrated across the state, from Ripley to Alderson to Wellsburg and many other locations in-between. We are so blessed to live in America, and to call West Virginia home. As Joe always says, "if you can count your blessings, share your blessings."

Joe is a West Virginian through and through - born and raised here. Team Manchin is proud to travel across the state and tell our fellow West Virginians about Joe.

Hot On The Trail

Team Manchin is all over West Virginia at parades, festivals, and community events. Last week, we were at John Henry Days in Talcott and the Wetzel County Blue Wave Dinner, as well as the grand opening of the Jefferson County Democratic Headquarters. Joe also stopped by the American Legion convention in Huntington and rallied with UMWA coal miners for their hard-earned pensions in Columbus.

This weekend, you'll be able to find us at the Putnam County Fair, the Friends of Coal Auto Fair in Beckley, the Poultry Festival in Moorefield, and other places in-between.

Polling Update

The polling makes it clear Joe Manchin has strong support from every pocket of West Virginia because he is working to bring both parties together to get things done for the Mountain State. West Virginians are getting angry that Patrick Morrisey is trying to block health insurance coverage for people with pre-existing conditions.

General Election Polling | Manchin | Morrisey
---|---|---

[Hart Research](https://images.myngp.com/LinkTracker.aspx?crypt=IVi0ax2%2b6UDLpC3olJXC43DCBP8ZTn3v8p5DymU3NmzFYnro7qdPc7r5Uf1ZGByJau0fiSzOdHeYbvUm%2fQNCwt9bpHsYPB2IjF8IP39R6b7tcQUzVYJAnHFKsIIVUMhELTH5Jj8w0cPgqMtOGZlB%2fo5rKcrTB4Rf4FshsOrbhSIEhaaaUItQeF4aqnk83%2f7LvFVBYC0o4wPofk23W6ufQg%3d%3d) | 52% | 40%

Fundraising Update

Thanks to the strong support we've received from grassroots supporters, Joe Manchin was able to raise more money than Patrick Morrisey. Our campaign has a 6 to 1 cash on hand advantage over Morrisey thanks to the people of West Virginia.

In the last fundraising period, we raised over $1.5 million. [See more here](https://images.myngp.com/LinkTracker.aspx?crypt=IVi0ax2%2b6UDLpC3olJXC49dv5qke%2fMhftpSFNOxGBAsv2q6MYCr7uiDMElspGZI%2f7u2gtkHGtp1YIv0WgjugBE%2bNpKdoPMbpIkRS7k1aWXwpV6GirbnHwX8DOZrvoIN0TwURNdoLpfi2lM8%2f4x7MTl55V9tGyl0fYnJg1w8Y6%2fiGzfG1jI7UZXNY%2f5P3tAg%2b).

Pre-Existing Conditions

Over 2,000 West Virginians have signed our petition to stop Pat Morrisey and protect people pre-existing conditions. Go to [www.StopMorrisey.com](https://images.myngp.com/LinkTracker.aspx?crypt=IVi0ax2%2b6UBSinc%2fCPYaKe6cLwxdlpyOrU1qF8uayZM%2f0GAnAYnCCqwA2IdUULCcd0W4PrZDyd8XcV9IwNaReY89F3xFg7e%2bIYrYzlANxlIFz%2fVGvcjlWw%3d%3d) to add your name to tell Morrisey to stop doing the dirty work of the big insurance companies.

West Virginians with pre-existing conditions are speaking out. Just read this letter to the editor from the Williamson Daily News.

"In plain words, if you have diabetes, cancer or any illness in between, you won't have coverage if Morrisey wins in court. Over 800,000 people in West Virginia families get left behind. I'm writing because I have diabetes and my husband has pre-existing conditions. My family's healthcare and the healthcare of my neighbors is more important to me than the political agenda of our attorney general."

Joe In the News

WOAY News (ABC): [VIDEO: Manchin discusses pre-existing conditions](https://images.myngp.com/LinkTracker.aspx?crypt=IVi0ax2%2b6UDLpC3olJXC4xvlHofxv9cxhDTIKFQ09GzUyvguwKeswftoEMmGQ2ID3VJB1FwRftkX6Gjq37ApmFdH6m%2fx9e%2f4OzeLLAKKZd2eI2SFeSb5QbhQ4aTwG0u4Dt8Rnjkmuz9ntp6vnTTej0dq7FlsCwe%2bBHnq8fNpwdo%3d)

Beckley Register-Herald: [Manchin hosts roundtable on pre-existing conditions](https://images.myngp.com/LinkTracker.aspx?crypt=IVi0ax2%2b6UBSinc%2fCPYaKQkTFXbMcbVr3AQbkpNLf%2fELnnkBt9deR%2buqMN8KSGD%2fXAjpa5MJkK7piQnAOnVodW0NqEz3t9IWW6mGwOAPgEQGhe2yZK7igw5uK%2bkT%2fkpjqhGppnHi%2flEQml2nur1CFTKIQNvIct5rMhOHP%2ff1QwhDxiIUx7YDNRvYzfdvD8cHf1UYC3vrp2IJVZSSUiaJSWfaLWU%2bPi%2f3NqelC8nrc93nNArrMhn2%2fSTs4e72t82dMPWdm8MAx3U%3d)

clean_body: Dear Fellow West Virginian, We are on the move. As West Virginians came together on the Fourth of July to honor the birth of our great nation, Joe and his team celebrated across the state, from Ripley to Alderson to Wellsburg and many other locations in-between. We are so blessed to live in America, and to call West Virginia home. As Joe always says, "if you can count your blessings, share your blessings." Joe is a West Virginian through and through - born and raised here. Team Manchin is proud to travel across the state and tell our fellow West Virginians about Joe. Hot On The Trail Team Manchin is all over West Virginia at parades, festivals, and community events. Last week, we were at John Henry Days in Talcott and the Wetzel County Blue Wave Dinner, as well as the grand opening of the Jefferson County Democratic Headquarters. Joe also stopped by the American Legion convention in Huntington and rallied with UMWA coal miners for their hard-earned pensions in Columbus. This weekend, you'll be able to find us at the Putnam County Fair, the Friends of Coal Auto Fair in Beckley, the Poultry Festival in Moorefield, and other places in-between. Polling Update The polling makes it clear Joe Manchin has strong support from every pocket of West Virginia because he is working to bring both parties together to get things done for the Mountain State. West Virginians are getting angry that Patrick Morrisey is trying to block health insurance coverage for people with pre-existing conditions. name: Senator Maggie Hassan
subject: Putin and Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Hello,
Just days after his own Justice Department indicted 12 Russian intelligence operatives for attacking our elections, President Trump stood with Vladimir Putin and put the interests of the Russian Federation ahead of those of the United States of America.
If the President of the United States won't defend our country against foreign attacks, then Congress must step in and act.
[**I 'm calling on my colleagues in Congress to come together across party lines to hold Russia accountable, and I need to know that you support this fight. Please sign my petition urging Congress to protect our democracy and protect the integrity of our free and fair elections.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc0c9/2a380d31/c815e08/f1a3ff/1942696979/VEsH/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/s/2018_StopPutin")
Thanks to the extraordinary work of our intelligence community, there is no question that Russian agents conducted deliberate and sophisticated attacks to try to interfere in our 2016 election.
Never did I think we would see the President of the United States blame our own country for attacks by an adversary on the very foundation of our democracy.
**It is incumbent on all of us as American citizens to demand that our elected officials hold President Trump accountable for his actions.[That's why I need you to please click here to sign this petition calling on Congress to defend our great country.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc0c9/2a380d31/c815e08/f1a3ff/1942696979/VEsE/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/s/2018_StopPutin")**
Thank you.
With every good wish,
Senator Maggie Hassan
[Contribute](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc0c9/2a380d31/c815e08/f1a3f8/1942696979/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX2dlbmVyYWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE4MDcxOF9QdXRpbl82bW8iLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_general?refcode=e20180718_Putin_6mo&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
To unsubscribe from the Maggie for NH email list, please click here: [Unsubscribe](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc0c9/2a380d31/c815e08/f1a3f9/1942696979/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

name: Hall Rapid Response
subject: Rep. Walorski just accepted our debate offer!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mel Hall for Congress
body:
Great news: because of your hard work and support today, Rep. Walorski just accepted Mel's offer of three televised debates!

Mel looks forward to sharing his views with voters and presenting his vision to protect health care, grow jobs, and fight for Hoosier families.

Thank you for being a part of this.

Team Mel

\------\------\------Original message from Mel Hall------\------\------

Friends,

Yesterday, I sent Rep. Jackie Walorski a letter calling on her to accept the offer to three televised debates.

Accountable leadership is central to effective representation in Washington. That's why I am firmly committed to providing the voters in the 2nd District with the chance to hear directly from us.

**Please help me ensure that Hoosiers have the opportunity to watch their 2nd District congressional candidates debate. Share my letter to Rep. Jackie Walorski now to spread the word.**

****[SHARE ON FACEBOOK](https://act.myngp.com/el/CepFbaqx6bDmU95u8u670gQqNAeVuiSGvYsuhynFf4g=/qT8LJSySEHmm2y3C0WZXcnKiEtWnEhDUgwBdPH0hZVU=)****
****[SHARE ON TWITTER](https://act.myngp.com/el/CepFbaqx6bDmU95u8u670gQqNAeVuiSGvYsuhynFf4g=/RwDEFBVWvqYJBF3rabGyca3u7ZPz0SA8N2bPgQ8JCto=)****

As I travel across the ten counties of the 2nd District, I talk every day with Hoosiers who want to hear our views on the challenges facing northern Indiana and our nation. These Hoosiers want to participate in our democracy, and we must provide them with the opportunity to do so.

Thank you for helping to spread the word and show Rep. Walorski that 2nd District voters are eager for three debates.

Mel Hall

Paid for by Mel Hall for Congress
---
Mel Hall for Congress
P.O. Box 862
South Bend, IN 46624 United States

name: Jay Inslee
subject: Trump's Weakness. Our Patriotism.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
If the president won't stand up to Russia, we must.

| [](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd78a99/2f5ea88d/77bedbb3/2cbc087b/2927295313/VEsH/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/page/s/rga-petition?utm_source=ema_2018-07-19_rga-petition&source=ema_2018-07-19_rga-petition&utm_campaign=rga-petition&utm_medium=ema") Friend, During our most challenging moments, Americans so often show our very best instincts. We band together. We unite against hate. We take action because we know there are some values far bigger than any individual or any political party. And yet here we are at one of those moments. Our country was attacked. Our democracy was threatened. Yet this president has put himself ahead of his own country. The only question now is if his fellow Republicans have the courage to act on behalf of the people they've sworn to serve. When the president of the United States stands feet from a hostile regime, we expect leadership, we expect patriotism, and we expect courage. But instead, Trump shook Vladimir Putin's hand -- with a smile and a wink -- then bent to the will of a dictator. President Trump proved his cowardice. He showed how weak he truly is. And yes, his actions in Helsinki were inexcusable. Then yesterday Trump asked us to believe his denial of the attacks on our democracy were a misspeak! I don't know about you, but this is one lie too many for me. Now our only question is: How will we collectively respond as a country -- Republicans and Democrats alike? Today, right here and right now, Republicans across the country must do more than tweet their condemnation -- they must put country ahead of party. It's time to act. And that's why, as Chair of the Democratic Governors Association, I call on the Republican Governors Association to join us in refusing to use hacked data in our campaigns. Our democracy is too important to simply give in to Russian interference. We know we can't depend on Donald Trump to stand up to Russia. But I hope his fellow Republicans will. [**Add your name now -- because if Trump won't stand up to Russia, the rest of us must act. Tell Republicans to refuse to use any hacked data in their campaigns.**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd78a99/2f5ea88d/77bedbb3/2cbc087b/2927295313/VEsE/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/page/s/rga-petition?utm_source=ema_2018-07-19_rga-petition&source=ema_2018-07-19_rga-petition&utm_campaign=rga-petition&utm_medium=ema") It's just one small way to show our strength as the president shows his weakness. It's just one way to show we'll lead with integrity while the president fills the airways with lies. And it's one small act of unity -- in a time where it's so difficult to find common ground. But it's through action and unity that we'll take our country back -- one step, no matter how small, at a time. Thanks for your patriotism. It matters now more than ever. Very truly yours, Jay Inslee | [ADD YOUR NAME »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd78a99/2f5ea88d/77bedbb3/2cbc087b/2927295313/VEsF/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/page/s/rga-petition?utm_source=ema_2018-07-19_rga-petition&source=ema_2018-07-19_rga-petition&utm_campaign=rga-petition&utm_medium=ema")

clean_body: If the president won't stand up to Russia, we must. | "" Friend, During our most challenging moments, Americans so often show our very best instincts. We band together. We unite against hate. We take action because we know there are some values far bigger than any individual or any political party. And yet here we are at one of those moments. Our country was attacked. Our democracy was threatened. Yet this president has put himself ahead of his own country. The only question now is if his fellow Republicans have the courage to act on behalf of the people they've sworn to serve. When the president of the United States stands feet from a hostile regime, we expect leadership, we expect patriotism, and we expect courage. But instead, Trump shook Vladimir Putin's hand -- with a smile and a wink -- then bent to the will of a dictator. President Trump proved his cowardice. He showed how weak he truly is. And yes, his actions in Helsinki were inexcusable. Then yesterday Trump asked us to believe his denial of the attacks on our democracy were a misspeak! I don't know about you, but this is one lie too many for me. Now our only question is: How will we collectively respond as a country -- Republicans and Democrats alike? Today, right here and right now, Republicans across the country must do more than tweet their condemnation -- they must put country ahead of party. It's time to act. And that's why, as Chair of the Democratic Governors Association, I call on the Republican Governors Association to join us in refusing to use hacked data in our campaigns. Our democracy is too important to simply give in to Russian interference. We know we can't depend on Donald Trump to stand up to Russia. But I hope his fellow Republicans will. "" It's just one small way to show our strength as the president shows his weakness. It's just one way to show we'll lead with integrity while the president fills the airways with lies. And it's one small act of unity -- in a time where it's so difficult to find common ground. But it's through action and unity that we'll take our country back -- one step, no matter how small, at a time. Thanks for your patriotism. It matters now more than ever. Very truly yours, Jay Inslee | ""

name: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez
subject: A bolt of electricity through New York
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Zephyr for NY
body:
We need champions like Zephyr Teachout.
#

Peter -
Dark money plagues our democracy. It corrupts the democratic power of working-class voters and protects an economic system that undermines our interests. With incredibly large, and often anonymous donations, large corporations drown out the voices of the constituents our representatives are supposed to protect.
Even worse, their privileged status in our campaign finance system is protected by a vicious cycle and collective action problem. Republicans and Democrats alike decry calls for reform, claiming they have to take corporate money _because their opponents do too!_
And as such, the cycle continues. Political candidates accept larger and larger quantities of corporate dark money, and since Citizens United, our hopes for top-down reforms were destroyed.
If we're going to defeat this system of dark money corporate control, we need champions for working-class voters to stand up and refuse to be coerced by their influence. **We need champions like Zephyr Teachout.**
[](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780eac/6e822e2f/1b873be1/41724b6e/3213172523/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xODA3MTktZnVsbCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zephyr-aoc?refcode=em180719-full")
**I 'm incredibly proud to endorse Zephyr's candidacy for New York Attorney General.** The checks on corporate donations are completely broken -- **and it 's up to us to fix them.**
But first, we need to counteract the influence of corporate-backed politicians by electing candidates that refuse all corporate money.
**[Can you contribute $3 to support Zephyr's campaign, and fight for candidates that refuse all corporate money?](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780eac/6e822e2f/1b873be1/41724b6e/3213172523/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xODA3MTktZnVsbCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zephyr-aoc?refcode=em180719-full")**
**[DONATE](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780eac/6e822e2f/1b873be1/41724b6e/3213172523/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xODA3MTktZnVsbCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zephyr-aoc?refcode=em180719-full")**
It's pretty simple -- if we want candidates to win against candidates with huge corporate-funded war chests, we have to help fund them ourselves. To overcome an incredibly entrenched system of corporate money, we're going to need a movement.
With each powerful anti-corporate candidate, that movement grows stronger.
Pa'lante,
Alexandria

* * *
Paid for by Zephyr for NY
---
1789 Madison Ave, New York, NY 10035

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Click [here](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780eac/6e822e2f/1b873be1/41724b6f/3213172523/VEsC/ "http://zephyr.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe/") if you'd like to unsubscribe. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email. To support Zephyr with a contribution, click [here](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780eac/6e822e2f/1b873be1/41724b50/3213172523/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zephyr-for-ny?refcode=em_footer").

name: Amy
subject: Words matter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Klobuchar for Minnesota
body:
Hi,

This week, when asked during a press conference watched live across the globe, President Trump contradicted America's own intelligence agencies when he said that he didn't know "why it would be Russia" that interfered in the 2016 election.

Less than 24 hours later, the President changed his tune, saying he simply misspoke, and meant to say "wouldn't."

And the day after that, this administration was trying to clarify what "no" meant in response to a simple question about foreign interference in our elections.

It's too much.**Words matter.**

As citizens we deserve to know what our elected officials think about the big issues of the day. And that means the President must say what he means, and mean what he says.

The walk backs and "misunderstandings" coming from the White House are unacceptable.

_This isn 't the time for mistakes. This is the time for clear, direct leadership._

**You can see why this election is so important.**

[**Sign up to volunteer**](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=9%2B6G3GBIZ6EKBUR8h2lCWJGUXx3%2Ftclw)**or[donate to join the team today if you agree words matter.](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=7LpLpF2KgKN9rPm5n7dcizqdWScUeF1t)**[](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=T3uObEDGKwQ1p2RRcZVR9DqdWScUeF1t)

Thanks,
Amy

name: Russia Survey | WolfForPa.com
subject: What do you think of Trump's ties to Russia?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tom Wolf for Governor
body:
\-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | Hello --

Last week, 12 Russian intelligence officers were indicted for their involvement in U.S. election meddling.

But instead of condemning their actions, President Trump shamelessly praised Russian President Vladimir Putin in a Helsinki summit while publicly criticizing and contradicting U.S. intelligence and law enforcement officials.

Our democracy is in danger, and Governor Wolf is ready to defend our rights, our future, and the integrity of our elections -- but we need to know where you stand. **[Will you take our survey now and let Tom know your thoughts on President Trump and his failure to condemn Russian interference in our elections?](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ec3d4/73a2bc12/38352660/1fce115e/3641097593/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/s/russia-opinion-survey?gpsid=14_50_2177&source=em18_180719_russia_engg_gq_act__wfp_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180719_russia_engg_gq_act__wfp_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=twolf&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_content=1+-+Will+you+take+our+survey+now+and+let+Tom")** | [**RUSSIA OPINION SURVEY**](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ec3d4/73a2bc12/38352660/1fce115d/3641097593/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/s/russia-opinion-survey?gpsid=14_50_2177&source=em18_180719_russia_engg_gq_act__wfp_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180719_russia_engg_gq_act__wfp_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=twolf&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_content=2+-+RUSSIA+OPINION+SURVEY")

---
President Trump's own director of national intelligence has warned that our elections and our nation are under attack by Russian intelligence. If we wait to act, the 2020 election -- and our election this year -- could look a lot like 2016.

We need to know how you feel about Trump's performance in Helsinki, whether you agree with the FBI that Russia interfered in our elections, and whether you're ready to join Tom in fighting to defend our elections -- before it's too late.

**[Take the survey now, and let Tom know where you stand on President Trump and Russian attempts to rig American elections:](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ec3d4/73a2bc12/38352660/1fce1141/3641097593/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/s/russia-opinion-survey?gpsid=14_50_2177&source=em18_180719_russia_engg_gq_act__wfp_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180719_russia_engg_gq_act__wfp_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=twolf&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_content=6+-+Take+the+survey+now+and+let+Tom+know+whe")**

name: Tim Kaine
subject: It still gives me a kick
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
| | Derek,

In the past few months, I've been all over the Commonwealth, talking to voters in communities from Alexandria to South Boston to Suffolk. And everywhere we go, people want to show their support for Democrats in 2018.

[Well, that's about to get easier - because in case you haven't seen, we launched our official campaign shop on Monday. (And unlike Amazon Prime, it didn't crash!)](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1206/3e0906/69076993/3e35fb13/4072403716/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kaine-online-merch-store?refcode=20180719_1_STORE_TK_Store-TK&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+Well+thatrsquos+about+to+get+easier++bec&utm_campaign=20180719_1_STORE_TK_Store-TK&source=20180719_1_STORE_TK_Store-TK")

I have to say, it still gives me a kick to see "Kaine" on T-shirts, bumper stickers, and even sunglasses - and we're so appreciative of all of the support we have received from this amazing grassroots team.

**Believe it or not - I even make suggestions for campaign gear!** Keep an eye out for a sticker that plays off my nickname, "America's Dad" (my kids are gonna roll their eyes!).

[So Derek, I'd like to encourage you to visit the online shop.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1206/3e0906/69076993/3e35fb12/4072403716/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kaine-online-merch-store?refcode=20180719_1_STORE_TK_Store-TK&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+So+FIRSTNAMEhey+Irsquod+like+to+encourag&utm_campaign=20180719_1_STORE_TK_Store-TK&source=20180719_1_STORE_TK_Store-TK") It's a great way to show your support for our campaign and the whole Democratic ticket - and the proceeds will help ensure that we have the resources we need to come out on top this [November.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1206/3e0906/69076993/3e35fb11/4072403716/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kaine-online-merch-store?refcode=20180719_1_STORE_TK_Store-TK&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=3+-+November&utm_campaign=20180719_1_STORE_TK_Store-TK&source=20180719_1_STORE_TK_Store-TK")

name: Samantha Avila
subject: URGENT: Make calls for Dr. Ward
body:
|
---
N/A -- ****Good morning,**** Dr. Ward has been working tirelessly to get elected, and now it is up to us to fight together with her to win this critical U.S. Senate seat – and finally get an Arizona Senator who supports President Trump and the America First agenda.**** The next 7 days are especially important, as we work to reach as many people as possible before early voting starts - something that is critical in Arizona, where 80% of primary voters take advantage of early voting. It is no exaggeration to say that the next week may actually determine who wins the Republican primary election, and therefore who will be the next U.S. Senator from Arizona. So, today we are asking everyone to please set aside a few hours a day for the next week to make phone calls and help get us those votes! If we don’t act now, we could very well get stuck with another establishment, fake conservative senator for the next six years. We can’t afford to let that happen, so, please, step up today, commit to making some phone calls, and help Dr. Kelli Ward win this election! If there is anything we can do to help you make this happen, please feel free to call/text Sam at 623-205-8541 or [sam@kelliward.com](mailto:sam@kelliward.com). ****

Samantha Avila
[http://www.wardforarizona.com/](http://www.wardforarizona.com/?e=fa6f97f500b2dd17f5e159d2d0c5907d&utm_source=kelliward&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=urgepeopletocall&n=1)
Kelli Ward for Senate, Inc. · United States

name: Chris Evans, betofortexas.com
subject: Houston Chronicle: Beto O’Rourke vs. Ted Cruz is most expensive U.S. Senate race in America
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR TEXAS
body:
[1]Beto for Texas

Hey there,

Check out this breaking headline out of the Houston Chronicle:

“Beto O’Rourke vs. Ted Cruz is most expensive U.S. Senate race in America”

And the Cruz vs O’Rourke numbers do not include millions of dollars being
amassed by so-called Super PACs that can raise and spend unlimited amounts
of money to support or oppose candidates indirectly. For instance, past
Cruz donors have helped build up more than $2.7 million in a Super PAC
called Texans Are.

Houston Chronicle, July 18, 2018

Here is the situation. Last quarter, we out-raised Ted Cruz for the fifth
time with a record-breaking $10.4 million, all from grassroots donations
-- no money from PACs, or corporations, or special interests. Together,
with an average donation of right around $30, we’re proving that it’s
possible to run a truly people-powered campaign.

But we can’t afford to slow down for even one second. Especially when
we're finally within only a few points of Cruz. He has the PACs in his
corner. He has the super PACs too. Not to mention the Koch brothers. And
together, they are ramping up to spend millions against Beto, refusing to
stop until they stop the momentum we've had across the state.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/1001?refcode=ema180719-ak-full&t=1019&akid=537%2E444211%2EiUSw2r ]In the most expensive Senate race in the country, we either fight back
with grassroots support or we fall back without critical resources. Can
you step up with a donation of
$3
to Beto’s campaign to take on Ted Cruz?

While special-interest groups are ramping up to spend millions to
influence this race through glossy, over-produced tv ads, our organizing
team is working hard on the ground in communities across Texas, talking
directly to voters about what’s at stake in November.

Thanks to your support, we’ve built what might be the largest grassroots
organizing team that Texas has ever seen. Every single day, we’re bringing
more volunteers who stand with Beto and take action -- texting, calling,
going door to door, organizing -- in their own communities.

At the end of the day, our ability to win depends on our resources, both
on the ground and in the bank. We need to keep growing our movement. And
it takes donations -- $5, $10, $15 at a time -- from people like you to
grow big enough that no super PAC or special interest group can take us
down. There's too much on the line to let them.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/1020?t=1020&akid=537%2E444211%2EiUSw2r ]We can’t afford to lose in November. The stakes are just too high.
That means we’re going to lean on our grassroots team of supporters more
than ever in the coming months. Can you step up and pitch in
$3
to help Beto fight back against these inevitable super PAC
attacks?

Thank you! Talk soon,

Chris Evans
Beto for Texas

$3

name: Stephanie Schriock, EMILY's List
subject: [Senate] 2 flips + 10 re-elects to help protect choice
disclaimer_text: Paid for by EMILY's List [www
body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c4ce6/24c69fd9/27db06535/18823cb1/138643302/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFES40N_digital_email_20180719_SCOTUSGamePlan_inact&source=WQEFES40N_digital_email_20180719_SCOTUSGamePlan_inact")
---

Peter,

The Muslim ban. Fake women's health centers. Workers' rights. Voting rights.

It's been a terrible few weeks at the Supreme Court.

And now Republicans have the chance to confirm an anti-choice justice who presents a grave threat to _Roe v. Wade_.

We cannot allow them to take us back to the time of our mothers and grandmothers.

We have to take back the Senate to stop Trump and the GOP from confirming anti-choice judicial nominees -- including Brett Kavanaugh.

**[Donate $3 to help flip the Senate and protect our rights.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c4ce6/24c69fd9/27db06535/18823cb2/138643302/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180719_email_SCOTUSGamePlan?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Donate+3+to+help+flip+the+Senate+and+pro&utm_campaign=WQEFES40N_digital_email_20180719_SCOTUSGamePlan_inact&source=WQEFES40N_digital_email_20180719_SCOTUSGamePlan_inact")**

We only need to flip two seats to take back the Senate, and we've endorsed two pro-choice Democratic women who can do it: Jacky Rosen (NV) and Kyrsten Sinema (AZ).

We also need to re-elect our 10 sitting senators -- including Senators Dianne Feinstein, Mazie Hirono, and Amy Klobuchar who Kavanaugh will face on the Senate Judiciary Committee during his confirmation hearings.

**Donate $3 to help flip the Senate with pro-choice Democratic women and protect the right to choose:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Flip-Senate-Protect-Choice](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c4ce6/24c69fd9/27db06535/18823cb3/138643302/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180719_email_SCOTUSGamePlan?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgFlipSenateProtec&utm_campaign=WQEFES40N_digital_email_20180719_SCOTUSGamePlan_inact&source=WQEFES40N_digital_email_20180719_SCOTUSGamePlan_inact")**

Thank you,

Stephanie Schriock
President, EMILY's List

[](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c4ce6/24c69fd9/27db06535/18823cac/138643302/VEsC/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180719_email_SCOTUSGamePlan?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=WQEFES40N_digital_email_20180719_SCOTUSGamePlan_inact&source=WQEFES40N_digital_email_20180719_SCOTUSGamePlan_inact")
