name: Nina Turner, Our Revolution
subject: "How do people live on this?" Good question, Bernie Sanders. The answer from workers: They can't.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
body:
On Monday night I went to Senator Bernie Sanders' CEOs vs. Workers Townhall and listened to workers from Amazon, McDonald's, Disney, Walmart and American Airlines share their stories.
#
Friends,
On Monday night I went to Senator Bernie Sanders' CEOs vs. Workers Townhall and listened to workers from Amazon, McDonald's, Disney, Walmart and American Airlines share their stories.
[](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7aa1a/bed43eb/61716bd0/75fd4a99/3343474817/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-up-to-oligarchy?refcode=em180719")
I was haunted by what I heard: Americans who work for the most wildly profitable corporations in the country are struggling to get by on poverty wages. Their stories kept me up all night.
The workers we heard from are some of the hardest working, bravest, and most caring people you can imagine. People like:
* **Artemis Bell** , who has worked full time at Disneyland for 14 years and still only earns $11.86 an hour. Some of her "happiest place in the world" colleagues are living - and in one tragic case, dying - in their cars because they can't afford housing.
* **Cynthia Murray** , a Walmart employee for more than 18 years, who is STILL not making a livable wage. She told us how this global giant of a company, owned by the richest family in America, **puts out food donation boxes so their employees - many on Medicaid, in public housing and on food stamps - can donate to help _each other_ eat.**
* **Seth King** , a former Amazon worker, veteran, and father of two, who was working two jobs and still not earning enough to make ends meet. He asked himself, "if this is the best my life is going to get, why am I even still here?"
* **Adriana Alverez** , a McDonald's employee and single mother of a six-year-old boy. She asked, "what's a vacation?" This global behemoth of a company doesn't give employees like Adriana any form of paid leave.
* **Heather Hudson** , a single mom of four, working with an American Airlines affiliate for only $14.50 an hour after more than a decade of full-time employment for the company. She qualifies for food stamps because she cannot survive on only the poverty wages handed down by this wildly profitable American company.

What is happening to the workers of this country, at the hands of the richest--the most unimaginably, wildly wealthy--CEOs and companies in this country, is unconscionable.
Which begs the question: How do these CEOs sleep at night?
[**We cannot sit by while billionaire CEOs continue to dodge federal taxes while keeping their hardworking employees at or under the poverty line. Our Revolution groups across the country are volunteering to elect candidates who will prioritize American workers over CEO profits. Can you chip in $7 right now to help us hold these greedy CEOs accountable?**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7aa1a/bed43eb/61716bd0/75fd4a99/3343474817/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-up-to-oligarchy?refcode=em180719")
These stories of suffering, fuelled by incredible corporate greed, **are the stories of tens of millions of working Americans.** And they're written by America's largest and most unbelievably profitable companies, who pay their CEOs levels of compensation that would lift the entire bottom half of our country out of poverty.
Companies like Amazon, which paid no taxes last year and brags of their year-over-year profits without acknowledging that these incredible earnings are achieved off the backs of hard-working Americans like Seth. These companies purposely drive their workers to the brink of exhaustion and despair. **It's success off the back of suffering, and it needs to stop.**
[**Will you help us stand up to these greedy CEOs and hold them accountable to their employees? Help out by donating what you can now, to fund our efforts across the country electing and supporting progressive candidates who are ready to take on this fight.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7aa1a/bed43eb/61716bd0/75fd4a99/3343474817/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-up-to-oligarchy?refcode=em180719")
Heather, the employee with American Airlines, said something I find deeply disturbing. She said, "you will never understand how humiliating it is to be at the Social Security office, in line - _with your coworkers._ "
A company like American Airlines that made $1.9 billion last year should not have its long-tenured, loyal workers lining up **to be funded by our taxpayer dollars.** It is dead wrong that your tax dollars go to supporting the workers of America's most profoundly wealthy companies - **companies who CAN and should pay their workers a living wage.**
It's time they share the profits with their workers.
Thank you for being part of the political revolution that is fighting to end corporate greed.
In solidarity,
Nina Turner
President
Our Revolution
**[DONATE»](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7aa1a/bed43eb/61716bd0/75fd4a99/3343474817/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-up-to-oligarchy?refcode=em180719")**
P.S. Missed the town hall and want to check it out? [**Click here to watch it**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7aa1a/bed43eb/61716bd0/75fd4b55/3343474817/VEsD/ "https://www.facebook.com/PoliticalRevolution/videos/851467848377116/"), and then share it with your friends.
PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
PO Box 66208
WASHINGTON, DC, 20035

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a 501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are made to support Our Revolution's general mission and are not designated for any specific activity.
PO Box 66208, Washington, DC 20035

If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7aa1a/bed43eb/61716bd0/75fd4b54/3343474817/VEsA/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/information-update?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7aa1a/bed43eb/61716bd0/75fd4b57/3343474817/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjIyMTIzIn0=/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/OR-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7aa1a/bed43eb/61716bd0/75fd4b56/3343474817/VEsO/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Help us continue transforming American politics and fighting for progressive candidates and causes by [contributing to Our Revolution here](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7aa1a/bed43eb/61716bd0/75fd4b51/3343474817/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ourrevolution?refcode=email-footer-OR").

name: Phil Bredesen
subject: Trouble loading?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BREDESEN FOR SENATE
body:
#
Hey Team, does this look familiar to you?
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1687447/8977998/-722435536?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMDdiZDlmMS1iMThiLWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDBkM2ExMmJiYjEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=r_20pXwc4tpTwA007QvN-A6vYF0KV0MVAGkeXeBm6wM=)
Almost ten percent of the population in Tennessee does not have access to basic broadband internet. That’s a problem.
In today’s world, broadband internet is just as important as roads or telephones. Broadband access is a creator of economic opportunity and a way to keep us all connected. When any business is looking to invest in communities, they look at the infrastructure, including internet access.
We need to make sure our rural communities are not left behind when it comes to new companies coming in and investing in new jobs. That’s why I’m proposing a bold solution -- **empowering the Tennessee Valley Authority (TVA) to end the rural divide on broadband access.**
[**While lack of access to internet broadband in rural areas continues to stump Washington politicians, we have a uniquely Tennessee solution to fix this problem. Will you sign my petition to show your support for this proposal?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1687448/8977999/-722435536?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMDdiZDlmMS1iMThiLWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDBkM2ExMmJiYjEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=r_20pXwc4tpTwA007QvN-A6vYF0KV0MVAGkeXeBm6wM=)
**[Sign the petition →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1687449/8978000/-722435536?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMDdiZDlmMS1iMThiLWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDBkM2ExMmJiYjEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=r_20pXwc4tpTwA007QvN-A6vYF0KV0MVAGkeXeBm6wM=)**
Access to broadband creates jobs and keeps people living in their communities. **It’s time to add fast, robust broadband service to that list of fundamental utilities that power communities across our state.**
This could be accomplished legislatively by amending the TVA Act to allow the federal utility to partner with local telecommunications providers across the state. TVA is uniquely positioned to continue its original mission to “serve the people of the Tennessee Valley to help the region thrive and grow.”
[**I want our country to get back to the days when it did bold projects and not just tinker around the edges with grants, tax credits, and demonstration projects. Add your name if you’re with me.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1687450/8978001/-722435536?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMDdiZDlmMS1iMThiLWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDBkM2ExMmJiYjEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=r_20pXwc4tpTwA007QvN-A6vYF0KV0MVAGkeXeBm6wM=)
**[Sign the petition →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1687451/8978002/-722435536?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMDdiZDlmMS1iMThiLWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDBkM2ExMmJiYjEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=r_20pXwc4tpTwA007QvN-A6vYF0KV0MVAGkeXeBm6wM=)**
We have the opportunity to have our state lead the charge in bridging this digital divide and ensure that all of our communities – rural, urban, or suburban – have equal access to the infrastructure necessary to get ahead.
Let’s get it done.
— Phil Bredesen

PAID FOR BY BREDESEN FOR SENATE

name: Bob Casey
subject: I'm going to keep fighting -- can you join me?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bob Casey for Senate Inc
body:
[](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e60b2/51dbcc2a/1acf9567/3a63f01/863298920/VEsH/ "https://bobcasey.com/")
Here's what I want every Pennsylvania voter to know about me, before Election Day:

I believe that I answer to every Pennsylvanian, not just the well-connected ones.

I will always put people before corporations.

I vote for policies that will help working Pennsylvanians get ahead, and I vote against policies that hurt them.

I never back down from a fight when families' lives and livelihoods are on the line.

That's why I've dedicated my life to public service. It's also why, when President Trump's Supreme Court nominee comes to a Senate confirmation vote, I'm voting no.

President Trump outsourced this decision to corporate special interests -- organizations determined to destroy labor unions, repeal the Affordable Care Act and end Medicare and Medicaid as we know them. He made a corrupt bargain to gain their support during the 2016 election, and if this nominee is given a lifetime appointment to the Supreme Court, we will all pay the price.

Those same special interests are already coming after me for speaking out against this nomination. They're attacking me for refusing to participate in a process that is anything but normal. They're spending money here in Pennsylvania to intentionally misrepresent my position to voters.

**I want to make sure every voter knows what I just told you: what I stand for, who I work for and why I'm taking a stand on this issue. Can you donate $5 or more today to help push back against these attacks?**

Here's the best link: **_[secure.bobcasey.com/fight-back](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180719_fr1_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")_**

Thanks for joining me in this fight, team.

Bob

| | Bob needs a strong team to help keep this Senate seat blue so he can continue to protect Medicare, Medicaid and Social Security, fight for working families and be a check on the Trump administration.

Will you make your first donation to help out?
[DONATE](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180719_fr1_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")
---

Paid for by Bob Casey for Senate Inc.

PO Box 58746, Philadelphia, Pennsylvania 19102

Contributions or gifts to Bob Casey for Senate are not tax deductible.

Bob Casey for Senate appreciates any feedback you might have. [Click here](mailto:info@bobcasey.com?Subject=Feedback) to contact Bob Casey for Senate with any questions, concerns, or ideas. Want to stay updated on the campaign through social media? You can like Bob Casey for Senate on [Facebook](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e60b2/51dbcc2a/1acf9567/3a63f0d/863298920/VEsA/ "https://www.facebook.com/BobCaseyJr/") or follow the campaign on [Twitter](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e60b2/51dbcc2a/1acf9567/3a63f0e/863298920/VEsB/ "https://twitter.com/Bob_Casey") or [Instagram](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e60b2/51dbcc2a/1acf9567/3a63f0f/863298920/VEsO/ "https://www.instagram.com/bobcaseyjr/"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e60b2/51dbcc2a/1acf9567/3a63f08/863298920/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.bobcasey.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") from Bob Casey for Senate emails.

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: Why I wear an American-made suit
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown
body:
|
---

| | **President Trump Talks 'America First,'
But Sherrod Brown Wears It**
\-- _Time_ ; 7/11/2018 I buy my suits from the union factory ten minutes from my house, Peter. My family drives cars made here in Ohio. Even the canary pin I wear on my lapel was made in the Buckeye state. When I talk about supporting American workers and manufacturers, it's not a political gimmick. It's what I believe is right. I do everything I can to follow up my words with action -- both in Congress and in my day-to-day life. **And with all the turmoil in politics, we need to stay focused on fighting like hell for the American people.** [**I 'm personally asking for you to contribute Peter. Our July goal is $650,000. I know that sounds big, but it's not out of reach. And with new attacks coming in and my opponent closing in on the polls, we need to reach this goal to win this fall.**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ff808/4462dc26/5479bb63/20078d2a/3118816450/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwNzE5IiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180719?refcode=sbe180719_m_other&refcode2=3268183") _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[Express Donate: $5](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ff808/4462dc26/5479bb63/20078d29/3118816450/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwNzE5IiwiZTN0aGJXOTFiblI5ZlE9PSI6IjUiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180719?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=sbe180719_m_5&refcode2=3268183")** **[Express Donate: $10](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ff808/4462dc26/5479bb63/20078d29/3118816450/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwNzE5IiwiZTN0aGJXOTFiblI5ZlE9PSI6IjEwIiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180719?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=sbe180719_m_10&refcode2=3268183")** **[Express Donate: $26](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ff808/4462dc26/5479bb63/20078d29/3118816450/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwNzE5IiwiZTN0aGJXOTFiblI5ZlE9PSI6IjI2IiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180719?express_lane=true&amount=26&refcode=sbe180719_m_26&refcode2=3268183")** **[Or donate another amount.](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ff808/4462dc26/5479bb63/20078d2a/3118816450/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwNzE5IiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180719?refcode=sbe180719_m_other&refcode2=3268183")** We need voices fighting for our interests. It's why I fight like hell for American workers every day in the Senate and it's why I wear an American-made suit. One of the real joys of this job was the day I walked into the plant where I have had a real role in keeping these people employed. It's our job to make sure no one is left behind or forgotten -- whether she punches a clock, or whether he works in a diner. That's why we need to reach as many voters as we can, get our message out in Ohio, and make sure Team Sherrod comes out ahead in November. **As long as we all stick together, we will be successful.** [**I 'm proud to be fighting alongside hardworking families, but I need your help reaching this $650,000 goal. Your support is critical to our campaign gaining the resources we need to win. Give $5, $10, or maybe match our average online contribution of $26.**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ff808/4462dc26/5479bb63/20078d2a/3118816450/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwNzE5IiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180719?refcode=sbe180719_m_other&refcode2=3268183") With gratitude, Sherrod

name: =?utf-8?Q?Courtland=20and=20Chanel?=
subject: Life Isn't Complicated for the Innocent
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY COURTLAND SYKES FOR SENATE
body:
| | | |
---
| | | [ ](https://sykesforsenate2018.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4cc1eaa615d77dd655322ba1d&id=94c144c61a&e=9da9b0ca31)
---
| **Peter,**

**Life is not complicated when it comes to the innocent and the unborn.**

You are either FOR the Constitutional right to LIFE, Liberty, and the Pursuit of Happiness or you are against it. God has His hand on every life, but the responsibility is ours, (through the 10th Amendment) in each of our communities, to protect and to enforce the Founders' intent to protect ALL life under the Constitution.

_The selfish few on the left who want to commit murder under the guise of "abortion" and "choice" will have their Judgement Day;_ their moral compass is theirs to tend. **But we would be as guilty as they if we did not fight everyday to protect the unborn and the innocent and to fight to change the left's "pro-choice" ways.**

Should I become your U.S. Senator, _**I will parse no effort, I will parse no words in fighting and destroying Planned Parenthood and NARAL**_ \-- these organizations are blood-thirsty agents of evil. This is war. They must be stopped. But only if we fight together.

[Help us make that difference.](https://sykesforsenate2018.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4cc1eaa615d77dd655322ba1d&id=2f47b0ccb7&e=9da9b0ca31)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jim=20Banks?=
subject: Standing with law enforcement
body:
| | | |
---
| | | Friend,

Yesterday, I was proud to join my Republican colleagues in the House voting in favor of a resolution supporting our law enforcement and Immigrations and Customs Enforcement (ICE) officers.

**While the resolution passed overwhelmingly, 133 liberal Democrats decided to play political games by voting "present" instead of standing up for the brave men and women who keep our communities safe.**

Liberals all across the nation are in favor of abolishing ICE and opening our borders, proving just how out of touch they are with the concerns of hardworking families.

[Will you chip in $13.40 today](https://jimbanks.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9f5396c0af44767a2db1e30c&id=fbee0bc1c9&e=bfe3be83a5) to prevent my liberal opponent from becoming the 134th Democrat to turn their back on our law enforcement?
[](https://jimbanks.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9f5396c0af44767a2db1e30c&id=dbd23e6211&e=bfe3be83a5)
Keeping America safe will always be one of my top priorities in Congress. Whether they're serving in our communities or protecting our border--I stand with our law enforcement officers.

Working for you,

Jim
---
| [Join Our Team!](mailto:Steve@jimbanks.us?subject=Join%20Team%20Banks!&body=I%20would%20like%20to%20join%20Team%20Banks%20on%20the%20campaign%20trail.%20How%20can%20I%20help%3F "Join Our Team!")

name: Tina Smith
subject: Join me in telling the Trump administration to rescind their new rule and force dark money organizations to report their donors
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
We have to speak up now if we are going to stop this.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4b8c6/c1f7015/6b720d53/114228c9/3351045483/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjU1NzgzIiwiSlNWR1NWSlRWRTVCVFVVbEpRPT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/s/rtw_1807_dark-money?source=rtw_20180719_em-A&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=55783&firstname=") Friends -- I wanted to reach out because the Trump administration is quietly attempting to give even more power to the dark money organizations that wealthy donors use to influence our elections. **Under the just announced rule, donors who give to these organizations will be hidden from the IRS. That means even if someone gives $100 million to influence an election, we won 't know who did it. These organizations are already able to hide their donors from the general public, but now they want to make it harder for even law enforcement to track!** This is just ridiculous. Imagine the corruption that will follow from corporations, wealthy special interests, and foreign agents eager to influence elections without fear of getting caught. [**Join me in telling the Trump administration to rescind their new rule and force dark money organizations to report their donors. Our only chance to stop this is a tremendous amount of grassroots energy that will force them to back down.**](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4b8c6/c1f7015/6b720d53/114228c9/3351045483/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjU1NzgzIiwiSlNWR1NWSlRWRTVCVFVVbEpRPT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/s/rtw_1807_dark-money?source=rtw_20180719_em-A&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=55783&firstname=") **[Sign the Petition](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4b8c6/c1f7015/6b720d53/114228c9/3351045483/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjU1NzgzIiwiSlNWR1NWSlRWRTVCVFVVbEpRPT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/s/rtw_1807_dark-money?source=rtw_20180719_em-A&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=55783&firstname=")** The Russian charged with acting secretly as a foreign agent was trying to infiltrate the NRA during the 2016 election as part of her scheme. The NRA then spent over $30 million to elect Donald Trump. What if we couldn't know who gave them that money? I can't imagine the consequences to a system that is already under attack every day from wealthy donors, super PACs, and foreign governments if this rule stays on the books. [**Will you speak up now and tell the Trump administration to rescind this rule immediately? clean_body: We have to speak up now if we are going to stop this. | "=" Friends -- I wanted to reach out because the Trump administration is quietly attempting to give even more power to the dark money organizations that wealthy donors use to influence our elections. Under the just announced rule, donors who give to these organizations will be hidden from the IRS. That means even if someone gives $100 million to influence an election, we won 't know who did it. These organizations are already able to hide their donors from the general public, but now they want to make it harder for even law enforcement to track! This is just ridiculous. Imagine the corruption that will follow from corporations, wealthy special interests, and foreign agents eager to influence elections without fear of getting caught. "=" "=" The Russian charged with acting secretly as a foreign agent was trying to infiltrate the NRA during the 2016 election as part of her scheme. The NRA then spent over $30 million to elect Donald Trump. What if we couldn't know who gave them that money? I can't imagine the consequences to a system that is already under attack every day from wealthy donors, super PACs, and foreign governments if this rule stays on the books. "=" We can't be silent in this moment, Tina | Tina Smith is a fierce progressive running for U.S. Senate in a special election in Minnesota. That 's why Senate Republicans and Donald Trump have made her one of their top targets. She needs your help to hit her July goal if she is going to win this tough race. ""

|
[](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1203ace/2fde7c66/46dc27df/15682311/2351397325/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIyODQ1NyIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/supremect?gpsid=14_43_1615&refcode=em18_180627_supcrt_fnd_gq_act__sw_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180627_supcrt_fnd_gq_act__sw_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=rcoop&firstname=&lastname=&zip=28457&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_content=1")
---
It's go time, friend, This Saturday (July 21st) is Break the Majority's Day of Action -- and we need you there.

Election Day is just over 100 days away, which means it's time to get to work. For the first time, we have great candidates running in every district across the state -- now we need to get out and make sure we tell their stories to our friends and neighbors.

[**Can I count on you to join in on Saturday and knock some doors? Click here to find an event near you.**](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1203ace/2fde7c66/46dc27df/15682310/2351397325/VEsE/ "https://www.ncdp.org/events?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&utm_content=2+-+Can+I+count+on+you+to+join+in+on+Saturda&utm_campaign=BTM+Day+of+Action&source=BTM+Day+of+Action")

We made history in 2016 when we all came together and worked toward a common goal. Since then, we've had the midterm elections circled on the calendar as our next big step forward in North Carolina. We have just over 100 days to get the job done.

The work starts now, friend.

[**Find a volunteer event near you.**](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1203ace/2fde7c66/46dc27df/15682313/2351397325/VEsF/ "https://www.ncdp.org/events?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&utm_content=3+-+Find+a+volunteer+event+near+you&utm_campaign=BTM+Day+of+Action&source=BTM+Day+of+Action")

Thanks for all you continue to do,

Roy P.S. Can't make it this weekend? There will be other events near you soon. [**Sign up here**](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1203ace/2fde7c66/46dc27df/15682312/2351397325/VEsC/ "http://action.ncdp.org/page/m/-6e98be7c/76070bb8/585d60f1/2f381bcd/793787327/VEsF/p/eyJKU1Z6YjNWeVkyVWxKUT09IjoiIn0=/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&utm_content=4+-+Sign+up+here&utm_campaign=BTM+Day+of+Action&source=BTM+Day+of+Action") to get in touch with your local team. [](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1203ace/2fde7c66/46dc27df/15682315/2351397325/VEsD/ "http://www.ncdp.org/events?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&utm_content=5&utm_campaign=BTM+Day+of+Action&source=BTM+Day+of+Action")
